nodes.label: AI as tone and clarity editor
nodes.grounding_span: I primarily use AI to rewrite emails and paragraphs in reports for clarity and tone

nodes.label: AI as research initiator
nodes.grounding_span: if there is an engineering topic I don't know about I'll ask AI and it will give a good overview

nodes.label: AI as formula provider vs integrated tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully integrated Excel calculator builder
nodes.grounding_span: I'd like it to be able to design the Excel sheets themselves instead of me having to paste formulas

nodes.label: AI as skill development aid
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do everything myself in order to improve, but sometimes I'm aware my ability to communicate clearly is lacking

nodes.label: AI as sophisticated tool vs AGI
nodes.grounding_span: I think of it as a really good spell check/ calculator/search engine and nothing more

nodes.label: AI reliability and need for verification
nodes.grounding_span: I always double check everything it does so it doesn't save too much time

nodes.label: Effective communication
nodes.grounding_span: the client was impressed with the clear writing

nodes.label: Personal skill growth
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do everything myself in order to improve

nodes.label: Efficiency and time saving
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't save too much time

nodes.label: Professional autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think it was ever take over my job

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for biography writing
nodes.grounding_span: after a few iterations it came it really good

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's overly professional tone
nodes.grounding_span: the rest of the suggestion is overly professional and not how I communicate at all

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI replacing job
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think it was ever take over my job

nodes.label: Desire for better AI integration in engineering tools
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to be able to use it in Civil 3d and to be able to make it write clear complete specifications

nodes.label: Sentence-by-sentence iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I generally go sentence by sentence mixing and matching

nodes.label: Task delegation with bounded specificity
nodes.grounding_span: I usually give it specific tasks and refine the answers if necessary
